---
title: "Buffalo Chicken Dip"
author: "Chris Kornaros"
date: 2026-03-06
categories: ["Party Snacks and Dips"]
---

**ChickeIngredients:**

-   2 cups shredded cooked chicken

-   1 package (8 ounces) cream cheese, softened

-   1/2 cup Frank\'s RedHot® Original Cayenne Pepper Hot Sauce

-   1/2 cup ranch dressing

-   1/2 cup blue cheese crumbles

**Directions:**

1.  PREHEAT oven to 350°F. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl. Spoon
    into shallow 1-quart baking dish.

2.  BAKE 20 minutes or until mixture is heated through; stir. Sprinkle
    with green onions, if desired, and serve with chips, crackers and/or
    cut up veggies.
